description_long: This object consists of two modern, boxy houses separated by a shared green yard with trees, bushes, and outdoor furniture. Each house features large, rectangular windows and flat roofs, with one house clad in light stone and the other in white siding. The front yards are landscaped with flower beds, grass, and small fences, while the backyards include seating areas and garden elements. The houses have visible balconies and patios, and the doors are painted in contrasting colors—one red and one blue. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and an emphasis on open, airy spaces. The scene is set on a rectangular plot of land, bordered by low hedges.
description: A pair of modern, flat-roofed houses with large windows, landscaped yards, and minimalist design, separated by a shared green space.
description_view_0: Front view showing both houses, their main doors, landscaped front yards, and the central shared garden with trees and outdoor furniture.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the white house's large windows, balcony, and the depth of the property, with less visibility of the shared garden.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyards, patios, and the central green space with trees and seating, as well as the flat roofs of both houses.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the stone-clad house, its large windows, and the flower beds near the entrance.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple entryways with flat doors, minimal steps, and small landscaped beds; no porch or overhang.
